What it is

An exceptionally fast Node.js utility parsing dynamically Claude Code terminal logs mapping specifically LLM telemetry calculating absolutely explicit fiscal expenditures reporting visually interactive tables instantly.

Problems solved

  • Resolves completely the extremely opaque nature calculating expensive token burn rates within terminal conversational constraints mapping precisely local cached logs ensuring completely transparent cost management intuitively.

How to get started

Invoke strictly via terminal running npx ccusage@latest passing optionally structural flags --daily tracking accurately real-time token depletion calculating explicitly offline Claude rate cards smoothly.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

CCUsage provides inherently the absolute definitive metric visualization dashboard processing specifically the internal ~/.claude execution traces proving explicitly fundamental cost transparency defining explicitly professional programmatic telemetry analysis.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Operating intelligent terminal applications rapidly accumulates completely hidden token expenses burning silently massive prepaid API credits. This specific tool aggregates completely discrete invisible JSON arrays generating immediately beautiful formatted terminal dashboards separating absolutely cached reads identifying strictly total financial liability flawlessly.

3. Technical Architecture

A wonderfully optimized TypeScript CLI tool prioritizing absolutely minimal bundle size parsing iteratively gigantic JSONL files evaluating dynamically multiple currency matrices computing deterministically explicit cost ratios supporting seamlessly various localized timezones securely.

4. Core Implementation

Identifies explicitly the localized user .claude directories parsing iteratively unstructured event streams categorizing correctly input/output/cached token payloads matching deeply predefined offline rate models aggregating exactly numerical variables mapping elegantly the final output utilizing sophisticated generic tabular rendering engines beautifully.

5. Code Organization

Abstracted brilliantly leveraging a modular monorepo matrix establishing highly specific module scopes (@ccusage/core, @ccusage/opencode) expanding systematically identical analytic logic matching explicitly different API platforms (Codex, Pi) securely mapping seamlessly multi-environment execution constraints natively.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Launch specifically utilizing npx ccusage daily --breakdown tracking precisely exact cost differentials identifying precisely exactly how specific intelligent reasoning modules exponentially inflate specific usage thresholds dynamically.

7. Summary

A fantastically helpful lightweight component optimizing structurally exactly how engineers validate precisely intelligent API expenditures protecting structurally specific cloud budgets enforcing effectively explicit application monitoring successfully.
